meaning: [化]n.杂芬油,木馏油,碳酸;vt.用木馏油处理
examples: His first home was a shack made of wooden railway sleepers, soaked in creosote to keep the termites out.
Timber is often treated with creosote to deter rot.
Exposure to creosote may present certain hazards.
King Creosote, Emma Pollock, Mike Scott, Julie Fowlis and Shooglenifty are also scheduled to perform.
As we thread our way down a steep trail of creosote and wispy dirt, a thunderstorm cuts loose.
